title: Local review must not leak first-person planning or tool narration
description: A local review scenario where the reviewer is tempted to narrate internal reasoning while classifying local diff findings. The correct output must remain the prompt-defined review only, with no leaked inner dialog.

scope.notes: Synthetic local-diff scope focused on preventing commentary leakage before the final review body.

mustCatch.description: The local review should emit only the final prompt-defined review body plus any applicable skill verification footer, without leaked planning or tool narration.

mustNotFlag.description: The review must not emit first-person drafting or planning text such as I’m thinking, Maybe I could, I should, or I’ll check.
The review must not emit tool activity narration such as Checked terminal output, Read file lines, Investigating, Evaluating terminal commands, or similar inner workflow text.

notes: Use this case to benchmark whether local review suppresses leaked planning and tool narration before emitting the final review.
